name: Microsoft Solitaire Collection
version_note: Windows 11 Microsoft Solitaire Collection (UWP Store app). Contains Klondike, Spider, FreeCell, Pyramid, TriPeaks.

launch.method: open_app(app_exe='solitaire', window_title='Solitaire'). If that fails, use Win+Search 'solitaire' + Enter.
startup_issues: May show internet error popup on launch — dismiss with Cancel or Escape.
May show sign-in prompt — click 'Not Now' or 'Skip' or press Escape.
May show ad/video — wait for 'Skip' button or press Escape.
May resume previous game — always start a new game explicitly.
May open a browser tab with an ad — DON'T close the browser, use focus_app to switch back.
launch.fullscreen: ALWAYS press F11 or maximize the window after opening. This prevents clicking on background apps.

klondike.rules: Standard Klondike solitaire. 7 tableau columns, 4 foundation piles (top right), stock pile (top left), waste pile.
klondike.goal: Move all cards to the 4 foundation piles, building up from Ace to King in each suit.
klondike.tableau_rules: Build down in alternating colors (red on black, black on red). Kings can go on empty columns.
klondike.foundation_rules: Build up by suit from Ace to King (Ace first, then 2, 3... King).
klondike.stock: Click the stock pile (top left) to draw cards. When stock is empty, click to recycle.
klondike.new_game: To start a new game: press F2, or click the menu/hamburger icon and select 'New Game'.
tips: Double-click a card to auto-move it to the foundation if possible — much faster than dragging.
Always move Aces and 2s to foundations immediately.
Prefer uncovering face-down cards over other moves.
Don't move cards to foundations too aggressively — you may need them on the tableau.
Empty columns are valuable — only fill them with Kings.
Draw from stock when no obvious tableau moves exist.
Use 'H' key for hints if stuck.

ui_layout.note: Approximate positions when fullscreen at 2560x1600. Verify with vision.
ui_layout.stock_pile: Top-left area (~x=200, y=350). Click to draw a card.
ui_layout.waste_pile: Next to stock (~x=400, y=350). Top card is playable.
ui_layout.tableau: 7 columns below, spread across the middle of the screen (~y=500+).
ui_layout.menu: Hamburger icon top-left corner or top bar.

known_issues: App may show ads between games — wait or dismiss.
Internet error popup appears if offline — just dismiss with Cancel.
Sign-in prompts appear periodically — skip/dismiss them.
The app sometimes opens a browser tab — NEVER close the browser, just switch back.
Card positions change every game — always use vision to locate cards.
Overlapping cards in tableau — only the bottom-most visible card in each column is playable.
Drag must start ON the card and end ON the target pile/column.
strategy_for_agent: 1. Open app, go fullscreen (F11), start new game (F2).
2. Look at the screen to identify all visible cards and their positions.
3. Check for Aces — move them to foundations immediately (double-click).
4. Look for obvious tableau moves (alternating colors, descending).
5. Draw from stock when no tableau moves available.
6. Use double_click for foundation moves (faster and more reliable than dragging).
8. After each move, look at the screen to see the new state.
9. If stuck for 3+ turns, use H key for a hint.
10. Don't spend more than 2 look/screenshot actions in a row — act on what you see.
